# Compositional Simulation

**Summary**: A simulation method that models the behavior of multi-component hydrocarbon fluids in a reservoir.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2000-hashmi|Hashmi, 2000]] used compositional simulation to model the performance of a layered gas condensate reservoir.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The simulation successfully modeled the impact of fracture parameters on production rates and condensate saturation distribution. ([[2000-hashmi|Hashmi, 2000, p. 22]])
